name: Lamb and Apple Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the lamb chops with salt and pepper, then coat them with flour.
2. Brown the coated chops on both sides in oil over medium heat. Remove from the pan and set aside.
3. In the same pan, cook chopped onions in oil until soft and golden. Add to the crockpot.
4. Work any remaining flour into the hot fat, add stock, and stir. Bring to a boil, stirring well.
5. Add thinly sliced carrots, celery, and apple to the crockpot. Return the chops on top.
6. Pour over the thickened stock, season to taste. Cover and cook on HIGH for 30 minutes, then on LOW for 6-7 hours.
